case_title: HUM, BONNIE vs. ISHIMOTO, NORMAN P. AN IND/DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUM, BONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT ISHIMOTO, NORMAN P. AN IND/DBA KIYOMURA-ISHIMOTO ASSOCIATES
